description: Selecting a nullable column returns Option type

columns.name: bio
columns.note: bio column allows NULL in schema

name: nullable_column
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserIdAndBio
-- @returns :one
SELECT id, bio FROM users WHERE id = $1
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
